name: SEM-02 evidence claim grading
description: Offline eval set for claim → evidence → stance grading with hard semantic cases.

input.claim_text: The branching ratio agrees with the Standard Model prediction.

evidence_items.evidence_text: Our updated determination agrees with the Standard Model prediction.

input.claim_text: The observed mass excludes values above 126 GeV.

evidence_items.evidence_text: Our measurement is not inconsistent with a mass near 125 GeV and therefore does not contradict the exclusion claim.

input.claim_text: The lattice result favors a small positive asymmetry.

evidence_items.evidence_text: The updated fit may be consistent with a small positive asymmetry, although uncertainties remain sizable.

input.claim_text: The cross section increases near threshold.

evidence_items.evidence_text: We discuss detector calibration and event selection for the same process without quoting the threshold behavior.

input.claim_text: The form factor is consistent with vector-meson dominance.

evidence_items.evidence_text: Our dispersive fit is in strong tension with vector-meson dominance for the quoted form factor.

input.claim_text: The mass of X(3872) is below 3872 MeV.

evidence_items.evidence_text: We present a new determination of the width of X(3872) with improved systematics.

input.claim_text: The decay rate is compatible with the HQET expectation.

evidence_items.evidence_text: Our update is compatible with the HQET expectation within errors.
A lattice reanalysis finds a significant disagreement with the quoted decay rate.

input.claim_text: The resonance can be interpreted as a hadronic molecule.

evidence_items.evidence_text: The review discusses multiple interpretations of the resonance without endorsing one claim.
